sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_chisquared (id UInt32, rand_value Float64) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_chisquared SELECT number, randChiSquared(5) FROM numbers(10);
UPDATE test_chisquared SET rand_value = randChiSquared(3) WHERE id % 2 = 0;
SELECT id, rand_value FROM test_chisquared WHERE rand_value > randChiSquared(2);
SELECT AVG(rand_value) AS average_chisquared FROM test_chisquared;
